name: Tech Central, Inc.
summary: Tech Central, Inc. engages in online video and photography content development and distribution businesses. The company is also involved in Website and mobile app technology integration design and development activities. Its content services include video shoots, photography, photo shoots, video and photography editing, voiceover, and Ad copywriting. In addition, the company offers CBD product line for sleep, anxiety, inflammation, and stress. The company was incorporated in 2014 and is based in Temecula, California.
